blended.narrative: Eldora is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Strong winds with gusts to 43 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: overcast, highs of 45°F, gusts to 43 mph.
Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 51°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 8" over the past week. Current depth: 35".
